case_title: DARCY BELGARDE VS. DEBRA NICHOLS DESIGN, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELGARDE, DARCY AS TO DEFENDANT DEBRA NICHOLS DESIGN, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELGARDE, DARCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBRA NICHOLS DESIGN, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $27,887.17 PRINCIPAL, $209.26 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,546.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
